examples.corrected: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

examples.id: Other.2.c.Unable to work/daily activities > 2 weeks (last 5 years)
examples.corrected: Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two consecutive weeks at a time
